creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
marcel@scc.nl writes:

> >Description:
> Building KDE 1.0 from /usr/ports/x11/kde fails on kdegraphics (IIRC).
> Configure is unable to find libgif, which is part of kdesupport.

libgif comes from giflib in /usr/ports/graphics/giflib and the
dependencies in kdegraphics point there. Why it hasn't been built is
hard to tell without some logs.

tg
